upstreamCalls.query: query BulkProductsCatalogHydrate($first: Int!, $after: String) { products(first: $first, after: $after) { nodes { id title tags } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

statusPolls.query:
query BulkCatalogHydrationOperationById($id: ID!) {
  bulkOperation(id: $id) {
    
  id
  status
  type
  errorCode
  createdAt
  completedAt
  objectCount
  rootObjectCount
  fileSize
  url
  partialDataUrl
  query

  }
}
